headerDisplay: See the [GitHub page](https://github.com/simplytoast1/Ring-Smoke-Detectors) for setup instructions. Use the button below to generate a refresh token from your Ring account.

name.title: Name
name.description: Exposes Kidde/Ring smart smoke and CO detectors to HomeKit via Homebridge

refreshToken.title: Refresh Token
refreshToken.description: Click "Generate New Refresh Token" above to authenticate with your Ring account

locationIds.title: Location IDs
locationIds.description: Optional: limit to specific Ring location IDs
